name: Praline Creme Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 425 degrees. In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients; beat until well blended. Pour into pie crust-lined pan. Bake at 425 for 15 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees. In a small bowl, combine brown sugar and flour. Using pastry blender or fork, cut in margarine until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in pecans; sprinkle over pumpkin filling. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Cool completely. In a small bowl, combine cream cheese, milk and orange peel; mix until smooth. Gently fold whipped topping into cream cheese mixture. Spoon over cooled pie. Refrigerate until serving time.
